Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*****************************************************************

 Enrichments of categories

 In this file, we define enrichments of categories, functors, and
 natural transformations. Note that we define these enrichments as
 categories/functors/transformations with extra data and
 properties, whereas the standard definition of enriched category
 does not do so.

 There are a couple of reasons for this choice:
 - It will help use prove the univalence of the bicategory of
   univalent enriched categories. That is because in the whole
   proof, we don't have to prove equality of the type of objects.
   As such, we can reuse the proof that the bicategory of
   univalent categories is univalent.
 - If we would use the usual definition of enriched categories,
   then in order to access the morphisms, we would first need to
   take the underlying category. With this definition, we can use
   a coercion instead.

 Our definition is loosely inspired by the one given by McDermott
 and Uustalu in "What makes a strong monad?"

 https://arxiv.org/pdf/2207.00851.pdf

 We also define faithful monoidal categories. These are monoidal
 categories in which the representable functor is faithful. This
 property is useful, because it implies that every natural
 transformation is actually enriched.

 Contents
 1. Enrichments of categories
 2. Equality of enrichments
 3. Faithfulness
 4. Composition operations
 5. Transport lemmas

 *****************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.covyoneda.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.All.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.

Import MonoidalNotations.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope moncat.

(**
 1. Enrichments of categories
 *)
Definition enrichment_data
           (C : precategory_data)
           (V : monoidal_cat)
  : UU
  := ∑ (arr : C → C → V),
     (∏ (x : C), I_{V} --> arr x x)
     ×
     (∏ (x y z : C), arr y z ⊗ arr x y --> arr x z)
     ×
     (∏ (x y : C), x --> y → I_{V} --> arr x y)
     ×
     (∏ (x y : C), I_{V} --> arr x y → x --> y).

Definition arr_enrichment_data
           {C : precategory_data}
           {V : monoidal_cat}
           (E : enrichment_data C V)
           (x y : C)
  : V
  := pr1 E x y.

Notation "E ⦃ x , y ⦄" := (arr_enrichment_data E x y) (at level 49).

Definition enriched_id
           {C : precategory_data}
           {V : monoidal_cat}
           (E : enrichment_data C V)
           (x : C)
  : I_{V} --> E ⦃ x , x ⦄
  := pr12 E x.

Definition enriched_comp
           {C : precategory_data}
           {V : monoidal_cat}
           (E : enrichment_data C V)
           (x y z : C)
  : (E ⦃ y , z ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x ,  y ⦄) --> E ⦃ x , z ⦄
  := pr122 E x y z.

Definition enriched_from_arr
           {C : precategory_data}
           {V : monoidal_cat}
           (E : enrichment_data C V)
           {x y : C}
           (f : x --> y)
  : I_{V} --> E ⦃ x , y ⦄
  := pr1 (pr222 E) x y f.

Definition enriched_to_arr
           {C : precategory_data}
           {V : monoidal_cat}
           (E : enrichment_data C V)
           {x y : C}
           (f : I_{V} --> E ⦃ x , y ⦄)
  : x --> y
  := pr2 (pr222 E) x y f.

Definition enrichment_laws
           {C : precategory_data}
           {V : monoidal_cat}
           (E : enrichment_data C V)
  : UU
  := (∏ (x y : C),
      mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x , y ⦄)
      =
      enriched_id E y #⊗ identity _ · enriched_comp E x y y)
     ×
     (∏ (x y : C),
      mon_runitor (E ⦃ x , y ⦄)
      =
      identity _ #⊗ enriched_id E x · enriched_comp E x x y)
     ×
     (∏ (w x y z : C),
      enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E w x z
      =
      mon_lassociator _ _ _
      · identity _ #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
      · enriched_comp E w y z)
     ×
     (∏ (x y : C) (f : x --> y),
      enriched_to_arr E (enriched_from_arr E f)
      =
      f)
     ×
     (∏ (x y : C) (f : I_{V} --> E ⦃ x , y ⦄),
      enriched_from_arr E (enriched_to_arr E f)
      =
      f)
     ×
     (∏ (x : C),
      enriched_to_arr E (enriched_id E x)
      =
      identity x)
     ×
     (∏ (x y z : C) (f : x --> y) (g : y --> z),
      f · g
      =
      enriched_to_arr
        E
        (mon_linvunitor I_{V}
         · (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)
         · enriched_comp E x y z)).


C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment_data C V
isaprop (enrichment_laws E)


C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment_data C V
isaprop (enrichment_laws E)

  repeat (use isapropdirprod) ; repeat (use impred ; intro) ; apply homset_property.
Qed.

Definition enrichment
           (C : precategory_data)
           (V : monoidal_cat)
  : UU
  := ∑ (E : enrichment_data C V), enrichment_laws E.

Coercion enrichment_to_data
         {C : precategory_data}
         {V : monoidal_cat}
         (E : enrichment C V)
  : enrichment_data C V
  := pr1 E.

Section EnrichmentLaws.
  Context {C : precategory_data}
          {V : monoidal_cat}
          (E : enrichment C V).

  
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
enriched_id E y #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x y y

  
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
enriched_id E y #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x y y

    exact (pr12 E x y).
  Qed.

  
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
mon_runitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E x
· enriched_comp E x x y

  
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
mon_runitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E x
· enriched_comp E x x y

    exact (pr122 E x y).
  Qed.

  
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E w x z =
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
· enriched_comp E w y z

  
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E w x z =
mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
· enriched_comp E w y z

    exact (pr1 (pr222 E) w x y z).
  Qed.

  
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
· enriched_comp E w y z =
mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E w x z

  
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
· enriched_comp E w y z =
mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E w x z

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
· enriched_comp E w y z =
mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· (enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E w x z)

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· (enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E w x z) =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
· enriched_comp E w y z

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· (enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E w x z) = ?b
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
?b =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
· enriched_comp E w y z

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· (enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E w x z) = ?b

      
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E w x z = ?t2

      apply enrichment_assoc.
    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
     (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
   · identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
   · enriched_comp E w y z) =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
· enriched_comp E w y z

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
· enriched_comp E w y z =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
· enriched_comp E w y z

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
identity
  ((E ⦃ y, z ⦄) ⊗ ((E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)))
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
· enriched_comp E w y z =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
· enriched_comp E w y z

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
· enriched_comp E w y z =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
· enriched_comp E w y z

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_to_arr E (enriched_from_arr E f) = f

  
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_to_arr E (enriched_from_arr E f) = f

    exact (pr12 (pr222 E) x y f).
  Qed.

  
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr E (enriched_to_arr E f) = f

  
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr E (enriched_to_arr E f) = f

    exact (pr122 (pr222 E) x y f).
  Qed.

  
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x: C
enriched_to_arr E (enriched_id E x) = identity x

  
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x: C
enriched_to_arr E (enriched_id E x) = identity x

    exact (pr1 (pr222 (pr222 E)) x).
  Qed.

  
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x: C
enriched_from_arr E (identity x) = enriched_id E x

  
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x: C
enriched_from_arr E (identity x) = enriched_id E x

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x: C
enriched_from_arr E (identity x) =
enriched_from_arr E
  (enriched_to_arr E (enriched_id E x))

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x: C
identity x = enriched_to_arr E (enriched_id E x)

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x: C
enriched_to_arr E (enriched_id E x) = identity x

    apply enriched_to_arr_id.
  Qed.

  
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f · g =
enriched_to_arr E
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
   · enriched_comp E x y z)

  
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f · g =
enriched_to_arr E
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
   · enriched_comp E x y z)

    exact (pr2 (pr222 (pr222 E)) x y z f g).
  Qed.

  
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E (f · g) =
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· enriched_comp E x y z

  
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E (f · g) =
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· enriched_comp E x y z

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E (f · g) =
enriched_from_arr E
  (enriched_to_arr E
     (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
      · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
      · enriched_comp E x y z))

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f · g =
enriched_to_arr E
  (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
   · enriched_comp E x y z)

    apply enriched_to_arr_comp.
  Qed.

  
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
isweq (enriched_from_arr E)

  
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
isweq (enriched_from_arr E)

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
V ⟦ I_{ V}, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
∏ x0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, ?g (enriched_from_arr E x0) = x0
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
∏ y0 : V ⟦ I_{ V}, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧,
enriched_from_arr E (?g y0) = y0

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
V ⟦ I_{ V}, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧
 exact (enriched_to_arr E).
    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
∏ x0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
enriched_to_arr E (enriched_from_arr E x0) = x0
 
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_to_arr E (enriched_from_arr E f) = f

      apply enriched_to_from_arr.
    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
∏ y0 : V ⟦ I_{ V}, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧,
enriched_from_arr E (enriched_to_arr E y0) = y0
 
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧
enriched_from_arr E (enriched_to_arr E f) = f

      apply enriched_from_to_arr.
  Defined.

  
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
isweq (enriched_to_arr E)

  
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
isweq (enriched_to_arr E)

    exact (pr2 (invweq (_ ,, isweq_enriched_from_arr x y))).
  Defined.
End EnrichmentLaws.

Definition cat_with_enrichment
           (V : monoidal_cat)
  : UU
  := ∑ (C : category), enrichment C V.

Coercion cat_with_enrichment_to_cat
         {V : monoidal_cat}
         (E : cat_with_enrichment V)
  : category
  := pr1 E.

Coercion cat_with_enrichment_to_enrichment
         {V : monoidal_cat}
         (E : cat_with_enrichment V)
  : enrichment E V
  := pr2 E.

Definition univ_cat_with_enrichment
           (V : monoidal_cat)
  : UU
  := ∑ (C : univalent_category), enrichment C V.

Coercion univ_cat_with_enrichment_to_univ_cat
         {V : monoidal_cat}
         (E : univ_cat_with_enrichment V)
  : univalent_category
  := pr1 E.

Coercion univ_cat_with_enrichment_to_enrichment
         {V : monoidal_cat}
         (E : univ_cat_with_enrichment V)
  : enrichment E V
  := pr2 E.


C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
is_precategory C


C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
is_precategory C

  
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
∏ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧), identity a · f = f
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
∏ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧), f · identity b = f
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
∏ (a b c d : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : C ⟦ c, d ⟧), f · (g · h) = f · g · h

  
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
∏ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧), identity a · f = f
 
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity x · f = f

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_to_arr E
  (enriched_from_arr E (identity x · f)) =
enriched_to_arr E (enriched_from_arr E f)

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_from_arr E (identity x · f) =
enriched_from_arr E f

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E f
  #⊗ enriched_from_arr E (identity x)
· enriched_comp E x x y = enriched_from_arr E f

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ enriched_id E x
· enriched_comp E x x y = enriched_from_arr E f

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· (enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity I_{ V}
   · identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E x)
· enriched_comp E x x y = enriched_from_arr E f

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E x
· enriched_comp E x x y = enriched_from_arr E f

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_rinvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E x
· enriched_comp E x x y = enriched_from_arr E f

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_from_arr E f · mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E x
· enriched_comp E x x y = enriched_from_arr E f

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_from_arr E f
· (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E x
      · enriched_comp E x x y)) =
enriched_from_arr E f

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_from_arr E f
· (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · mon_runitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)) = enriched_from_arr E f

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_from_arr E f · identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
enriched_from_arr E f

    apply id_right.
  
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
∏ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧), f · identity b = f
 
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
f · identity y = f

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_to_arr E
  (enriched_from_arr E (f · identity y)) =
enriched_to_arr E (enriched_from_arr E f)

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_from_arr E (f · identity y) =
enriched_from_arr E f

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E (identity y)
  #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f · enriched_comp E x y y =
enriched_from_arr E f

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_id E y #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· enriched_comp E x y y = enriched_from_arr E f

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
   · enriched_id E y #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
· enriched_comp E x y y = enriched_from_arr E f

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· enriched_id E y #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x y y = enriched_from_arr E f

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_from_arr E f · mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_id E y #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x y y = enriched_from_arr E f

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_from_arr E f
· (mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (enriched_id E y #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x y y)) =
enriched_from_arr E f

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_from_arr E f
· (mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)) = enriched_from_arr E f

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_from_arr E f · identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
enriched_from_arr E f

    apply id_right.
  
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
∏ (a b c d : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : C ⟦ c, d ⟧), f · (g · h) = f · g · h
 
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
f · (g · h) = f · g · h

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_to_arr E (enriched_from_arr E (f · (g · h))) =
enriched_to_arr E (enriched_from_arr E (f · g · h))

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E (f · (g · h)) =
enriched_from_arr E (f · g · h)

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E (f · (g · h)) = ?b
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b = enriched_from_arr E (f · g · h)

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E (f · (g · h)) = ?b

      
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr E h #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g
   · enriched_comp E x y z) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· enriched_comp E w x z = ?b

      
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· ((mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E h #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
   · enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))
· enriched_comp E w x z = ?b

      
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· ((mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E h #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
   · (enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E w x z)) = ?b

      
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· ((mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E h #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
   · (mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
        (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
      · identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
      · enriched_comp E w y z)) = ?b

      apply idpath.
    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· ((mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E h #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
   · (mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
        (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
      · identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
      · enriched_comp E w y z)) =
enriched_from_arr E (f · g · h)

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E (f · g · h) =
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· ((mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E h #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
   · (mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
        (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
      · identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
      · enriched_comp E w y z))

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E h
  #⊗ (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
      · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
      · enriched_comp E w x y) · enriched_comp E w y z =
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· ((mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E h #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
   · (mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
        (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
      · identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
      · enriched_comp E w y z))

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E h
  #⊗ (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
      · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
      · enriched_comp E w x y) · enriched_comp E w y z =
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr E h #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g)
  #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
· enriched_comp E w y z

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E h
  #⊗ (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
      · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
      · enriched_comp E w x y) =
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr E h #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g)
  #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· (enriched_from_arr E h
   #⊗ (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
       · enriched_from_arr E g
         #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)
   · identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y) =
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr E h #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g)
  #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E h
  #⊗ (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
      · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y =
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr E h #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g)
  #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E h
  #⊗ (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
      · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f) =
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr E h #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g)
  #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E h
  #⊗ (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
      · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f) =
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· ((mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E h #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
   · mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
       (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E h
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f) =
(mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
 · enriched_from_arr E h #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E h
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f) =
(mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
 · enriched_from_arr E h #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g)
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E h
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f) =
mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (enriched_from_arr E h #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g)
  #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E h
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f) =
mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· ((enriched_from_arr E h #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
   · mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
       (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E h
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f) =
mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} I_{ V}
   · enriched_from_arr E h
     #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E g
         #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f))

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E h
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f) =
mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E h
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ mon_linvunitor I_{ V} =
mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} I_{ V}

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ mon_rinvunitor I_{ V} =
mon_rinvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} I_{ V}

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ mon_rinvunitor I_{ V} =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ mon_linvunitor I_{ V}

    
C: precategory_data
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ mon_rinvunitor I_{ V} =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ mon_rinvunitor I_{ V}

    apply idpath.
Qed.

(**
 2. Equality of enrichments
 *)
Definition enrichment_data_hom_weq
           {C : precategory_data}
           {V : monoidal_cat}
           (HV : is_univalent V)
           (E₁ E₂ : enrichment_data C V)
  : (pr1 E₁ = pr1 E₂) ≃ ∏ (x y : C), z_iso (pr1 E₁ x y) (pr1 E₂ x y)
  := (weqonsecfibers
        _ _
        (λ x, weqonsecfibers _ _ (λ y, _ ,, HV _ _)
      ∘ weqtoforallpaths _ _ _) ∘ weqtoforallpaths _ _ _)%weq.

Definition enrichment_data_hom_path_help
           {C : precategory_data}
           {V : monoidal_cat}
           (E₁ E₂ : enrichment_data C V)
  : UU
  := ∑ (fs : ∏ (x y : C), z_iso (pr1 E₁ x y) (pr1 E₂ x y)),
     (∏ (x : C),
      enriched_id E₁ x · fs x x
      =
      enriched_id E₂ x)
     ×
     (∏ (x y z : C),
      enriched_comp E₁ x y z · fs x z
      =
      fs y z #⊗ fs x y · enriched_comp E₂ x y z)
     ×
     (∏ (x y : C) (f : x --> y),
      enriched_from_arr E₁ f · fs x y
      =
      enriched_from_arr E₂ f)
     ×
     (∏ (x y : C) (f : I_{V} --> E₁ ⦃ x , y ⦄),
      enriched_to_arr E₁ f
      =
      enriched_to_arr E₂ (f · fs x y)).


C: category
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V
E₁, E₂: enrichment_data C V
E₁ ╝ E₂ ≃ enrichment_data_hom_path_help E₁ E₂


C: category
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V
E₁, E₂: enrichment_data C V
E₁ ╝ E₂ ≃ enrichment_data_hom_path_help E₁ E₂

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V
E₁, E₂: enrichment_data C V
∏ x : pr1 E₁ = pr1 E₂,
(λ x0 : pr1 E₁ = pr1 E₂,
 transportf
   (λ x1 : C → C → V,
    (λ arr : C → C → V,
     (∏ x2 : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, arr x2 x2 ⟧)
     × (∏ x2 y z : C,
        V ⟦ arr y z ⊗ arr x2 y, arr x2 z ⟧)
       × (∏ x2 y : C,
          C ⟦ x2, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, arr x2 y ⟧)
         × (∏ x2 y : C,
            V ⟦ I_{ V}, arr x2 y ⟧ → C ⟦ x2, y ⟧)) x1)
   x0 (pr2 E₁) = pr2 E₂) x
≃ (λ x0 : ∏ x0 y : C,
          z_iso (pr1 E₁ x0 y) (pr1 E₂ x0 y),
   (∏ x1 : C,
    enriched_id E₁ x1 · x0 x1 x1 = enriched_id E₂ x1)
   × (∏ x1 y z : C,
      enriched_comp E₁ x1 y z · x0 x1 z =
      x0 y z #⊗ x0 x1 y · enriched_comp E₂ x1 y z)
     × (∏ (x1 y : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, y ⟧),
        enriched_from_arr E₁ f · x0 x1 y =
        enriched_from_arr E₂ f)
       × (∏ (x1 y : C)
          (f : V ⟦ I_{ V}, E₁ ⦃ x1, y ⦄ ⟧),
          enriched_to_arr E₁ f =
          enriched_to_arr E₂ (f · x0 x1 y)))
    (enrichment_data_hom_weq HV E₁ E₂ x)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V
E₁, E₂: enrichment_data C V
p: pr1 E₁ = pr1 E₂
(λ x : pr1 E₁ = pr1 E₂,
 transportf
   (λ x0 : C → C → V,
    (λ arr : C → C → V,
     (∏ x1 : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, arr x1 x1 ⟧)
     × (∏ x1 y z : C,
        V ⟦ arr y z ⊗ arr x1 y, arr x1 z ⟧)
       × (∏ x1 y : C,
          C ⟦ x1, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, arr x1 y ⟧)
         × (∏ x1 y : C,
            V ⟦ I_{ V}, arr x1 y ⟧ → C ⟦ x1, y ⟧)) x0)
   x (pr2 E₁) = pr2 E₂) p
≃ (λ x : ∏ x y : C, z_iso (pr1 E₁ x y) (pr1 E₂ x y),
   (∏ x0 : C,
    enriched_id E₁ x0 · x x0 x0 = enriched_id E₂ x0)
   × (∏ x0 y z : C,
      enriched_comp E₁ x0 y z · x x0 z =
      x y z #⊗ x x0 y · enriched_comp E₂ x0 y z)
     × (∏ (x0 y : C) (f : C ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
        enriched_from_arr E₁ f · x x0 y =
        enriched_from_arr E₂ f)
       × (∏ (x0 y : C)
          (f : V ⟦ I_{ V}, E₁ ⦃ x0, y ⦄ ⟧),
          enriched_to_arr E₁ f =
          enriched_to_arr E₂ (f · x x0 y)))
    (enrichment_data_hom_weq HV E₁ E₂ p)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V
M₁: C → C → V
E₁: (∏ x : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x x ⟧)
× (∏ x y z : C, V ⟦ M₁ y z ⊗ M₁ x y, M₁ x z ⟧)
  × (∏ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧)
    × (∏ x y : C,
       V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
E₂: enrichment_data C V
p: pr1 (M₁,, E₁) = pr1 E₂
transportf
  (λ x : C → C → V,
   (∏ x0 : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, x x0 x0 ⟧)
   × (∏ x0 y z : C, V ⟦ x y z ⊗ x x0 y, x x0 z ⟧)
     × (∏ x0 y : C, C ⟦ x0, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, x x0 y ⟧)
       × (∏ x0 y : C,
          V ⟦ I_{ V}, x x0 y ⟧ → C ⟦ x0, y ⟧)) p
  (pr2 (M₁,, E₁)) = pr2 E₂
≃ (∏ x : C,
   enriched_id (M₁,, E₁) x
   · enrichment_data_hom_weq HV (M₁,, E₁) E₂ p x x =
   enriched_id E₂ x)
  × (∏ x y z : C,
     enriched_comp (M₁,, E₁) x y z
     · enrichment_data_hom_weq HV (M₁,, E₁) E₂ p x z =
     enrichment_data_hom_weq HV (M₁,, E₁) E₂ p y z
     #⊗ enrichment_data_hom_weq HV (M₁,, E₁) E₂ p x y
     · enriched_comp E₂ x y z)
    × (∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
       enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₁) f
       · enrichment_data_hom_weq HV (M₁,, E₁) E₂ p x y =
       enriched_from_arr E₂ f)
      × (∏ (x y : C)
         (f : V ⟦ I_{ V}, (M₁,, E₁) ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧),
         enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₁) f =
         enriched_to_arr E₂
           (f
            · enrichment_data_hom_weq HV (M₁,, E₁) E₂
                p x y))

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V
M₁: C → C → V
E₁: (∏ x : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x x ⟧)
× (∏ x y z : C, V ⟦ M₁ y z ⊗ M₁ x y, M₁ x z ⟧)
  × (∏ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧)
    × (∏ x y : C,
       V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
M₂: C → C → V
E₂: (∏ x : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₂ x x ⟧)
× (∏ x y z : C, V ⟦ M₂ y z ⊗ M₂ x y, M₂ x z ⟧)
  × (∏ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₂ x y ⟧)
    × (∏ x y : C,
       V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₂ x y ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
p: pr1 (M₁,, E₁) = pr1 (M₂,, E₂)
transportf
  (λ x : C → C → V,
   (∏ x0 : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, x x0 x0 ⟧)
   × (∏ x0 y z : C, V ⟦ x y z ⊗ x x0 y, x x0 z ⟧)
     × (∏ x0 y : C, C ⟦ x0, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, x x0 y ⟧)
       × (∏ x0 y : C,
          V ⟦ I_{ V}, x x0 y ⟧ → C ⟦ x0, y ⟧)) p
  (pr2 (M₁,, E₁)) = pr2 (M₂,, E₂)
≃ (∏ x : C,
   enriched_id (M₁,, E₁) x
   · enrichment_data_hom_weq HV (M₁,, E₁) (M₂,, E₂) p
       x x = enriched_id (M₂,, E₂) x)
  × (∏ x y z : C,
     enriched_comp (M₁,, E₁) x y z
     · enrichment_data_hom_weq HV (M₁,, E₁) (M₂,, E₂)
         p x z =
     enrichment_data_hom_weq HV (M₁,, E₁) (M₂,, E₂) p
       y z
     #⊗ enrichment_data_hom_weq HV (M₁,, E₁) (M₂,, E₂)
          p x y · enriched_comp (M₂,, E₂) x y z)
    × (∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
       enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₁) f
       · enrichment_data_hom_weq HV (M₁,, E₁)
           (M₂,, E₂) p x y =
       enriched_from_arr (M₂,, E₂) f)
      × (∏ (x y : C)
         (f : V ⟦ I_{ V}, (M₁,, E₁) ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧),
         enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₁) f =
         enriched_to_arr (M₂,, E₂)
           (f
            · enrichment_data_hom_weq HV (M₁,, E₁)
                (M₂,, E₂) p x y))

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V
M₁: C → C → V
E₁: (∏ x : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x x ⟧)
× (∏ x y z : C, V ⟦ M₁ y z ⊗ M₁ x y, M₁ x z ⟧)
  × (∏ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧)
    × (∏ x y : C,
       V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
M₂: C → C → V
E₂: (∏ x : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₂ x x ⟧)
× (∏ x y z : C, V ⟦ M₂ y z ⊗ M₂ x y, M₂ x z ⟧)
  × (∏ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₂ x y ⟧)
    × (∏ x y : C,
       V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₂ x y ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
p: M₁ = M₂
transportf
  (λ x : C → C → V,
   (∏ x0 : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, x x0 x0 ⟧)
   × (∏ x0 y z : C, V ⟦ x y z ⊗ x x0 y, x x0 z ⟧)
     × (∏ x0 y : C, C ⟦ x0, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, x x0 y ⟧)
       × (∏ x0 y : C,
          V ⟦ I_{ V}, x x0 y ⟧ → C ⟦ x0, y ⟧)) p E₁ =
E₂
≃ (∏ x : C,
   enriched_id (M₁,, E₁) x
   · idtoiso
       (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, V) (M₁ x) (M₂ x)
          (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → V) M₁ M₂ p x) x) =
   enriched_id (M₂,, E₂) x)
  × (∏ x y z : C,
     enriched_comp (M₁,, E₁) x y z
     · idtoiso
         (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, V) (M₁ x) (M₂ x)
            (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → V) M₁ M₂ p x)
            z) =
     idtoiso
       (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, V) (M₁ y) (M₂ y)
          (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → V) M₁ M₂ p y) z)
     #⊗ idtoiso
          (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, V) (M₁ x) (M₂ x)
             (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → V) M₁ M₂ p x)
             y) · enriched_comp (M₂,, E₂) x y z)
    × (∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
       enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₁) f
       · idtoiso
           (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, V) (M₁ x) (M₂ x)
              (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → V) M₁ M₂ p
                 x) y) = enriched_from_arr (M₂,, E₂) f)
      × (∏ (x y : C) (f : V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧),
         enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₁) f =
         enriched_to_arr (M₂,, E₂)
           (f
            · idtoiso
                (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, V) (M₁ x)
                   (M₂ x)
                   (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → V) M₁
                      M₂ p x) y)))

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V
M₁: C → C → V
E₁, E₂: (∏ x : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x x ⟧)
× (∏ x y z : C, V ⟦ M₁ y z ⊗ M₁ x y, M₁ x z ⟧)
  × (∏ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧)
    × (∏ x y : C,
       V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
transportf
  (λ x : C → C → V,
   (∏ x0 : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, x x0 x0 ⟧)
   × (∏ x0 y z : C, V ⟦ x y z ⊗ x x0 y, x x0 z ⟧)
     × (∏ x0 y : C, C ⟦ x0, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, x x0 y ⟧)
       × (∏ x0 y : C,
          V ⟦ I_{ V}, x x0 y ⟧ → C ⟦ x0, y ⟧))
  (idpath M₁) E₁ = E₂
≃ (∏ x : C,
   enriched_id (M₁,, E₁) x
   · idtoiso
       (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, V) (M₁ x) (M₁ x)
          (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → V) M₁ M₁
             (idpath M₁) x) x) =
   enriched_id (M₁,, E₂) x)
  × (∏ x y z : C,
     enriched_comp (M₁,, E₁) x y z
     · idtoiso
         (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, V) (M₁ x) (M₁ x)
            (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → V) M₁ M₁
               (idpath M₁) x) z) =
     idtoiso
       (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, V) (M₁ y) (M₁ y)
          (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → V) M₁ M₁
             (idpath M₁) y) z)
     #⊗ idtoiso
          (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, V) (M₁ x) (M₁ x)
             (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → V) M₁ M₁
                (idpath M₁) x) y)
     · enriched_comp (M₁,, E₂) x y z)
    × (∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
       enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₁) f
       · idtoiso
           (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, V) (M₁ x) (M₁ x)
              (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → V) M₁ M₁
                 (idpath M₁) x) y) =
       enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₂) f)
      × (∏ (x y : C) (f : V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧),
         enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₁) f =
         enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₂)
           (f
            · idtoiso
                (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, V) (M₁ x)
                   (M₁ x)
                   (toforallpaths (λ _ : C, C → V) M₁
                      M₁ (idpath M₁) x) y)))

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V
M₁: C → C → V
E₁, E₂: (∏ x : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x x ⟧)
× (∏ x y z : C, V ⟦ M₁ y z ⊗ M₁ x y, M₁ x z ⟧)
  × (∏ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧)
    × (∏ x y : C,
       V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
E₁ = E₂
≃ (∏ x : C,
   enriched_id (M₁,, E₁) x · identity (M₁ x x) =
   enriched_id (M₁,, E₂) x)
  × (∏ x y z : C,
     enriched_comp (M₁,, E₁) x y z · identity (M₁ x z) =
     identity (M₁ y z) #⊗ identity (M₁ x y)
     · enriched_comp (M₁,, E₂) x y z)
    × (∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
       enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₁) f
       · identity (M₁ x y) =
       enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₂) f)
      × (∏ (x y : C) (f : V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧),
         enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₁) f =
         enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₂)
           (f · identity (M₁ x y)))

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V
M₁: C → C → V
E₁, E₂: (∏ x : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x x ⟧)
× (∏ x y z : C, V ⟦ M₁ y z ⊗ M₁ x y, M₁ x z ⟧)
  × (∏ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧)
    × (∏ x y : C,
       V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
E₁ = E₂
→ (∏ x : C,
   enriched_id (M₁,, E₁) x · identity (M₁ x x) =
   enriched_id (M₁,, E₂) x)
  × (∏ x y z : C,
     enriched_comp (M₁,, E₁) x y z · identity (M₁ x z) =
     identity (M₁ y z) #⊗ identity (M₁ x y)
     · enriched_comp (M₁,, E₂) x y z)
    × (∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
       enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₁) f
       · identity (M₁ x y) =
       enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₂) f)
      × (∏ (x y : C) (f : V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧),
         enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₁) f =
         enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₂)
           (f · identity (M₁ x y)))
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V
M₁: C → C → V
E₁, E₂: (∏ x : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x x ⟧)
× (∏ x y z : C, V ⟦ M₁ y z ⊗ M₁ x y, M₁ x z ⟧)
  × (∏ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧)
    × (∏ x y : C,
       V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(∏ x : C,
 enriched_id (M₁,, E₁) x · identity (M₁ x x) =
 enriched_id (M₁,, E₂) x)
× (∏ x y z : C,
   enriched_comp (M₁,, E₁) x y z · identity (M₁ x z) =
   identity (M₁ y z) #⊗ identity (M₁ x y)
   · enriched_comp (M₁,, E₂) x y z)
  × (∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
     enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₁) f · identity (M₁ x y) =
     enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₂) f)
    × (∏ (x y : C) (f : V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧),
       enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₁) f =
       enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₂)
         (f · identity (M₁ x y))) → E₁ = E₂
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V
M₁: C → C → V
E₁, E₂: (∏ x : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x x ⟧)
× (∏ x y z : C, V ⟦ M₁ y z ⊗ M₁ x y, M₁ x z ⟧)
  × (∏ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧)
    × (∏ x y : C,
       V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
isaprop (E₁ = E₂)
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V
M₁: C → C → V
E₁, E₂: (∏ x : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x x ⟧)
× (∏ x y z : C, V ⟦ M₁ y z ⊗ M₁ x y, M₁ x z ⟧)
  × (∏ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧)
    × (∏ x y : C,
       V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
isaprop
  ((∏ x : C,
    enriched_id (M₁,, E₁) x · identity (M₁ x x) =
    enriched_id (M₁,, E₂) x)
   × (∏ x y z : C,
      enriched_comp (M₁,, E₁) x y z
      · identity (M₁ x z) =
      identity (M₁ y z) #⊗ identity (M₁ x y)
      · enriched_comp (M₁,, E₂) x y z)
     × (∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
        enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₁) f
        · identity (M₁ x y) =
        enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₂) f)
       × (∏ (x y : C) (f : V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧),
          enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₁) f =
          enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₂)
            (f · identity (M₁ x y))))

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V
M₁: C → C → V
E₁, E₂: (∏ x : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x x ⟧)
× (∏ x y z : C, V ⟦ M₁ y z ⊗ M₁ x y, M₁ x z ⟧)
  × (∏ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧)
    × (∏ x y : C,
       V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
E₁ = E₂
→ (∏ x : C,
   enriched_id (M₁,, E₁) x · identity (M₁ x x) =
   enriched_id (M₁,, E₂) x)
  × (∏ x y z : C,
     enriched_comp (M₁,, E₁) x y z · identity (M₁ x z) =
     identity (M₁ y z) #⊗ identity (M₁ x y)
     · enriched_comp (M₁,, E₂) x y z)
    × (∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
       enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₁) f
       · identity (M₁ x y) =
       enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₂) f)
      × (∏ (x y : C) (f : V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧),
         enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₁) f =
         enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₂)
           (f · identity (M₁ x y)))
 
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V
M₁: C → C → V
E₁, E₂: (∏ x : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x x ⟧)
× (∏ x y z : C, V ⟦ M₁ y z ⊗ M₁ x y, M₁ x z ⟧)
  × (∏ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧)
    × (∏ x y : C,
       V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
p: E₁ = E₂
(∏ x : C,
 enriched_id (M₁,, E₁) x · identity (M₁ x x) =
 enriched_id (M₁,, E₂) x)
× (∏ x y z : C,
   enriched_comp (M₁,, E₁) x y z · identity (M₁ x z) =
   identity (M₁ y z) #⊗ identity (M₁ x y)
   · enriched_comp (M₁,, E₂) x y z)
  × (∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
     enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₁) f · identity (M₁ x y) =
     enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₂) f)
    × (∏ (x y : C) (f : V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧),
       enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₁) f =
       enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₂)
         (f · identity (M₁ x y)))

    
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V
M₁: C → C → V
E₁: (∏ x : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x x ⟧)
× (∏ x y z : C, V ⟦ M₁ y z ⊗ M₁ x y, M₁ x z ⟧)
  × (∏ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧)
    × (∏ x y : C,
       V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(∏ x : C,
 enriched_id (M₁,, E₁) x · identity (M₁ x x) =
 enriched_id (M₁,, E₁) x)
× (∏ x y z : C,
   enriched_comp (M₁,, E₁) x y z · identity (M₁ x z) =
   identity (M₁ y z) #⊗ identity (M₁ x y)
   · enriched_comp (M₁,, E₁) x y z)
  × (∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
     enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₁) f · identity (M₁ x y) =
     enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₁) f)
    × (∏ (x y : C) (f : V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧),
       enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₁) f =
       enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₁)
         (f · identity (M₁ x y)))

    
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V
M₁: C → C → V
E₁: (∏ x : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x x ⟧)
× (∏ x y z : C, V ⟦ M₁ y z ⊗ M₁ x y, M₁ x z ⟧)
  × (∏ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧)
    × (∏ x y : C,
       V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
x: C
enriched_id (M₁,, E₁) x · identity (M₁ x x) =
enriched_id (M₁,, E₁) x
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V
M₁: C → C → V
E₁: (∏ x : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x x ⟧)
× (∏ x y z : C, V ⟦ M₁ y z ⊗ M₁ x y, M₁ x z ⟧)
  × (∏ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧)
    × (∏ x y : C,
       V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
x, y, z: C
enriched_comp (M₁,, E₁) x y z · identity (M₁ x z) =
identity (M₁ y z) #⊗ identity (M₁ x y)
· enriched_comp (M₁,, E₁) x y z
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V
M₁: C → C → V
E₁: (∏ x : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x x ⟧)
× (∏ x y z : C, V ⟦ M₁ y z ⊗ M₁ x y, M₁ x z ⟧)
  × (∏ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧)
    × (∏ x y : C,
       V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₁) f · identity (M₁ x y) =
enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₁) f
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V
M₁: C → C → V
E₁: (∏ x : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x x ⟧)
× (∏ x y z : C, V ⟦ M₁ y z ⊗ M₁ x y, M₁ x z ⟧)
  × (∏ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧)
    × (∏ x y : C,
       V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
x, y: C
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧
enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₁) f =
enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₁) (f · identity (M₁ x y))

V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V

    × (∏ x y : C,
       V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧)

enriched_id (M₁,, E₁) x · identity (M₁ x x) =
enriched_id (M₁,, E₁) x

V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V

    × (∏ x y : C,

enriched_id (M₁,, E₁) x = enriched_id (M₁,, E₁) x

      apply idpath.

V: monoidal_cat

V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V

· enriched_comp (M₁,, E₁) x y z

      
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V
M₁: C → C → V

  × (∏ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧)
    × (∏ x y : C,
       V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧)

enriched_comp (M₁,, E₁) x y z =
identity (M₁ y z ⊗ M₁ x y)
· enriched_comp (M₁,, E₁) x y z

V: monoidal_cat

enriched_comp (M₁,, E₁) x y z =
enriched_comp (M₁,, E₁) x y z

V: monoidal_cat

C: category
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V
M₁: C → C → V
E₁, E₂: (∏ x : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x x ⟧)
× (∏ x y z : C, V ⟦ M₁ y z ⊗ M₁ x y, M₁ x z ⟧)
  × (∏ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧)
    × (∏ x y : C,
       V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(∏ x : C,
 enriched_id (M₁,, E₁) x · identity (M₁ x x) =
 enriched_id (M₁,, E₂) x)
× (∏ x y z : C,
   enriched_comp (M₁,, E₁) x y z · identity (M₁ x z) =
   identity (M₁ y z) #⊗ identity (M₁ x y)
   · enriched_comp (M₁,, E₂) x y z)
  × (∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
     enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₁) f · identity (M₁ x y) =
     enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₂) f)
    × (∏ (x y : C) (f : V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧),
       enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₁) f =
       enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₂)
         (f · identity (M₁ x y))) → E₁ = E₂

         (f · identity (M₁ x y)))

     enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₁) f
     · identity (M₁ x y) =
     enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₂) f)
    × (∏ (x y : C) (f : V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧),
       enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₁) f =
       enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₂)
         (f · identity (M₁ x y)))
x: C
pr1 E₁ x = pr1 E₂ x

      
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V
M₁: C → C → V
E₁, E₂: (∏ x : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x x ⟧)
× (∏ x y z : C, V ⟦ M₁ y z ⊗ M₁ x y, M₁ x z ⟧)
  × (∏ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧)
    × (∏ x y : C,
       V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
p: (∏ x : C,
 enriched_id (M₁,, E₁) x · identity (M₁ x x) =
 enriched_id (M₁,, E₂) x)
× (∏ x y z : C,
   enriched_comp (M₁,, E₁) x y z
   · identity (M₁ x z) =
   identity (M₁ y z) #⊗ identity (M₁ x y)
   · enriched_comp (M₁,, E₂) x y z)
  × (∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
     enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₁) f
     · identity (M₁ x y) =
     enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₂) f)
    × (∏ (x y : C) (f : V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧),
       enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₁) f =
       enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₂)
         (f · identity (M₁ x y)))
x: C
q:= pr1 p x: enriched_id (M₁,, E₁) x · identity (M₁ x x) =
enriched_id (M₁,, E₂) x
pr1 E₁ x = pr1 E₂ x

      
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V
M₁: C → C → V
E₁, E₂: (∏ x : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x x ⟧)
× (∏ x y z : C, V ⟦ M₁ y z ⊗ M₁ x y, M₁ x z ⟧)
  × (∏ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧)
    × (∏ x y : C,
       V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
p: (∏ x : C,
 enriched_id (M₁,, E₁) x · identity (M₁ x x) =
 enriched_id (M₁,, E₂) x)
× (∏ x y z : C,
   enriched_comp (M₁,, E₁) x y z
   · identity (M₁ x z) =
   identity (M₁ y z) #⊗ identity (M₁ x y)
   · enriched_comp (M₁,, E₂) x y z)
  × (∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
     enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₁) f
     · identity (M₁ x y) =
     enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₂) f)
    × (∏ (x y : C) (f : V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧),
       enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₁) f =
       enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₂)
         (f · identity (M₁ x y)))
x: C
q: enriched_id (M₁,, E₁) x = enriched_id (M₁,, E₂) x
pr1 E₁ x = pr1 E₂ x

      exact q.

V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V

     · identity (M₁ x y) =
     enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₂) f)
    × (∏ (x y : C) (f : V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧),
       enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₁) f =
       enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₂)
         (f · identity (M₁ x y)))
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q:= (pr122 p) x y f: enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₁) f · identity (M₁ x y) =
enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₂) f
(pr122 E₁) x y f = (pr122 E₂) x y f

      
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V
M₁: C → C → V
E₁, E₂: (∏ x : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x x ⟧)
× (∏ x y z : C, V ⟦ M₁ y z ⊗ M₁ x y, M₁ x z ⟧)
  × (∏ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧)
    × (∏ x y : C,
       V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
p: (∏ x : C,
 enriched_id (M₁,, E₁) x · identity (M₁ x x) =
 enriched_id (M₁,, E₂) x)
× (∏ x y z : C,
   enriched_comp (M₁,, E₁) x y z
   · identity (M₁ x z) =
   identity (M₁ y z) #⊗ identity (M₁ x y)
   · enriched_comp (M₁,, E₂) x y z)
  × (∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
     enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₁) f
     · identity (M₁ x y) =
     enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₂) f)
    × (∏ (x y : C) (f : V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧),
       enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₁) f =
       enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₂)
         (f · identity (M₁ x y)))
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q:= (pr122 p) x y f: enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₁) f · identity (M₁ x y) =
enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₂) f
(pr122 E₁) x y f = (pr122 E₂) x y f

      
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V
M₁: C → C → V
E₁, E₂: (∏ x : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x x ⟧)
× (∏ x y z : C, V ⟦ M₁ y z ⊗ M₁ x y, M₁ x z ⟧)
  × (∏ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧)
    × (∏ x y : C,
       V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
p: (∏ x : C,
 enriched_id (M₁,, E₁) x · identity (M₁ x x) =
 enriched_id (M₁,, E₂) x)
× (∏ x y z : C,
   enriched_comp (M₁,, E₁) x y z
   · identity (M₁ x z) =
   identity (M₁ y z) #⊗ identity (M₁ x y)
   · enriched_comp (M₁,, E₂) x y z)
  × (∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
     enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₁) f
     · identity (M₁ x y) =
     enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₂) f)
    × (∏ (x y : C) (f : V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧),
       enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₁) f =
       enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₂)
         (f · identity (M₁ x y)))
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
q: enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₁) f =
enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₂) f
(pr122 E₁) x y f = (pr122 E₂) x y f

      exact q.
    
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V
M₁: C → C → V
E₁, E₂: (∏ x : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x x ⟧)
× (∏ x y z : C, V ⟦ M₁ y z ⊗ M₁ x y, M₁ x z ⟧)

       V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
p: (∏ x : C,
 enriched_id (M₁,, E₁) x · identity (M₁ x x) =
 enriched_id (M₁,, E₂) x)
× (∏ x y z : C,
   enriched_comp (M₁,, E₁) x y z
   · identity (M₁ x z) =

       enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₁) f =
       enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₂)
         (f · identity (M₁ x y)))
pr222 E₁ = pr222 E₂

HV: is_univalent V

p: (∏ x : C,
 enriched_id (M₁,, E₁) x · identity (M₁ x x) =
 enriched_id (M₁,, E₂) x)

         (f · identity (M₁ x y)))

(pr222 E₁) x = (pr222 E₂) x

      
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V

       enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₁) f =

         (f · identity (M₁ x y)))

         (f · identity (M₁ x y)))

     enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₁) f

  × (∏ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧)
    × (∏ x y : C,

 enriched_id (M₁,, E₁) x · identity (M₁ x x) =
 enriched_id (M₁,, E₂) x)
× (∏ x y z : C,
   enriched_comp (M₁,, E₁) x y z

   identity (M₁ y z) #⊗ identity (M₁ x y)
   · enriched_comp (M₁,, E₂) x y z)
  × (∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
     enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₁) f
     · identity (M₁ x y) =
     enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₂) f)
    × (∏ (x y : C) (f : V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧),
       enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₁) f =
       enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₂)
         (f · identity (M₁ x y)))

f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧
q: enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₁) f =
enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₂) f
(pr222 E₁) x y f = (pr222 E₂) x y f

C: category
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V
M₁: C → C → V
E₁, E₂: (∏ x : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x x ⟧)
× (∏ x y z : C, V ⟦ M₁ y z ⊗ M₁ x y, M₁ x z ⟧)
  × (∏ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧)
    × (∏ x y : C,
       V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
isaprop (E₁ = E₂)
 repeat (apply isaset_dirprod) ;
    repeat (use impred_isaset ; intro) ;
    apply homset_property.
  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
HV: is_univalent V
M₁: C → C → V
E₁, E₂: (∏ x : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x x ⟧)
× (∏ x y z : C, V ⟦ M₁ y z ⊗ M₁ x y, M₁ x z ⟧)
  × (∏ x y : C, C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧)
    × (∏ x y : C,
       V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧ → C ⟦ x, y ⟧)
isaprop
  ((∏ x : C,
    enriched_id (M₁,, E₁) x · identity (M₁ x x) =
    enriched_id (M₁,, E₂) x)
   × (∏ x y z : C,
      enriched_comp (M₁,, E₁) x y z
      · identity (M₁ x z) =
      identity (M₁ y z) #⊗ identity (M₁ x y)
      · enriched_comp (M₁,, E₂) x y z)
     × (∏ (x y : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
        enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₁) f
        · identity (M₁ x y) =
        enriched_from_arr (M₁,, E₂) f)
       × (∏ (x y : C) (f : V ⟦ I_{ V}, M₁ x y ⟧),
          enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₁) f =
          enriched_to_arr (M₁,, E₂)
            (f · identity (M₁ x y))))
 repeat (apply isapropdirprod) ;
      repeat (use impred ; intro) ;
      apply homset_property.
Defined.

(**
 3. Faithfulness
 *)
Definition faithful_moncat
           (V : monoidal_cat)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y : V)
       (f g : x --> y),
     (∏ (a : I_{V} --> x), a · f = a · g)
     →
     f = g.


V: monoidal_cat
isaprop (faithful_moncat V)


V: monoidal_cat
isaprop (faithful_moncat V)

  
V: monoidal_cat
t, t0: V
t1, t2: V ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
t3: ∏ a : V ⟦ I_{ V}, t ⟧, a · t1 = a · t2
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ _ : ∏ a : V ⟦ I_{ V}, t ⟧, a · t1 = a · t2,
    t1 = t2) t3)

  apply homset_property.
Qed.


V: monoidal_cat
faithful_moncat V ≃ faithful (covyoneda V I_{ V})


V: monoidal_cat
faithful_moncat V ≃ faithful (covyoneda V I_{ V})

  
V: monoidal_cat
faithful_moncat V → faithful (covyoneda V I_{ V})
V: monoidal_cat
faithful (covyoneda V I_{ V}) → faithful_moncat V
V: monoidal_cat
isaprop (faithful_moncat V)
V: monoidal_cat
isaprop (faithful (covyoneda V I_{ V}))

  
V: monoidal_cat
faithful_moncat V → faithful (covyoneda V I_{ V})
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: faithful_moncat V
x, y: V
f: SET ⟦ covyoneda V I_{ V} x, covyoneda V I_{ V} y ⟧
isofhlevel 1
  (hfiber (λ f : V ⟦ x, y ⟧, # (covyoneda V I_{ V}) f)
     f)

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: faithful_moncat V
x, y: V
f: SET ⟦ covyoneda V I_{ V} x, covyoneda V I_{ V} y ⟧
isProofIrrelevant
  (hfiber (λ f : V ⟦ x, y ⟧, # (covyoneda V I_{ V}) f)
     f)

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: faithful_moncat V
x, y: V
f: SET ⟦ covyoneda V I_{ V} x, covyoneda V I_{ V} y ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: hfiber
  (λ f : V ⟦ x, y ⟧, # (covyoneda V I_{ V}) f) f
φ₁ = φ₂

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: faithful_moncat V
x, y: V
f: SET ⟦ covyoneda V I_{ V} x, covyoneda V I_{ V} y ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: hfiber
  (λ f : V ⟦ x, y ⟧, # (covyoneda V I_{ V}) f) f
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : V ⟦ x, y ⟧,
   (λ f : V ⟦ x, y ⟧, # (covyoneda V I_{ V}) f) x0 = f)
V: monoidal_cat
HV: faithful_moncat V
x, y: V
f: SET ⟦ covyoneda V I_{ V} x, covyoneda V I_{ V} y ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: hfiber
  (λ f : V ⟦ x, y ⟧, # (covyoneda V I_{ V}) f) f
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: faithful_moncat V
x, y: V
f: SET ⟦ covyoneda V I_{ V} x, covyoneda V I_{ V} y ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: hfiber
  (λ f : V ⟦ x, y ⟧, # (covyoneda V I_{ V}) f) f
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : V ⟦ x, y ⟧,
   (λ f : V ⟦ x, y ⟧, # (covyoneda V I_{ V}) f) x0 = f)

      
V: monoidal_cat
HV: faithful_moncat V
x, y: V
f: SET ⟦ covyoneda V I_{ V} x, covyoneda V I_{ V} y ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: hfiber
  (λ f : V ⟦ x, y ⟧, # (covyoneda V I_{ V}) f) f
x0: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
isaprop (# (covyoneda V I_{ V}) x0 = f)

      apply homset_property.
    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: faithful_moncat V
x, y: V
f: SET ⟦ covyoneda V I_{ V} x, covyoneda V I_{ V} y ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: hfiber
  (λ f : V ⟦ x, y ⟧, # (covyoneda V I_{ V}) f) f
pr1 φ₁ = pr1 φ₂

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: faithful_moncat V
x, y: V
f: SET ⟦ covyoneda V I_{ V} x, covyoneda V I_{ V} y ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: hfiber
  (λ f : V ⟦ x, y ⟧, # (covyoneda V I_{ V}) f) f
∏ a : V ⟦ I_{ V}, x ⟧, a · pr1 φ₁ = a · pr1 φ₂

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: faithful_moncat V
x, y: V
f: SET ⟦ covyoneda V I_{ V} x, covyoneda V I_{ V} y ⟧
φ₁, φ₂: hfiber
  (λ f : V ⟦ x, y ⟧, # (covyoneda V I_{ V}) f) f
g: V ⟦ I_{ V}, x ⟧
g · pr1 φ₁ = g · pr1 φ₂

    exact (eqtohomot (pr2 φ₁ @ !(pr2 φ₂)) g).
  
V: monoidal_cat
faithful (covyoneda V I_{ V}) → faithful_moncat V
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: faithful (covyoneda V I_{ V})
x, y: V
f, g: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
H: ∏ a : V ⟦ I_{ V}, x ⟧, a · f = a · g
f = g

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: faithful (covyoneda V I_{ V})
x, y: V
f, g: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
H: ∏ a : V ⟦ I_{ V}, x ⟧, a · f = a · g
(λ f : V ⟦ x, y ⟧, # (covyoneda V I_{ V}) f) f =
(λ f : V ⟦ x, y ⟧, # (covyoneda V I_{ V}) f) g

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: faithful (covyoneda V I_{ V})
x, y: V
f, g: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
H: ∏ a : V ⟦ I_{ V}, x ⟧, a · f = a · g
# (covyoneda V I_{ V}) f ~ # (covyoneda V I_{ V}) g

    exact H.
  
V: monoidal_cat
isaprop (faithful_moncat V)
 apply isaprop_faithful_moncat.
  
V: monoidal_cat
isaprop (faithful (covyoneda V I_{ V}))
 apply isaprop_faithful.
Qed.

Definition conservative_moncat
           (V : monoidal_cat)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y : V)
       (f : x --> y),
     isweq (λ (a : I_{V} --> x), a · f)
     →
     is_z_isomorphism f.


V: monoidal_cat
isaprop (conservative_moncat V)


V: monoidal_cat
isaprop (conservative_moncat V)

  
V: monoidal_cat
t, t0: V
t1: V ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
t2: isweq (λ a : V ⟦ I_{ V}, t ⟧, a · t1)
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ _ : isweq (λ a : V ⟦ I_{ V}, t ⟧, a · t1),
    is_z_isomorphism t1) t2)

  apply isaprop_is_z_isomorphism.
Qed.


V: monoidal_cat
conservative_moncat V
≃ conservative (covyoneda V I_{ V})


V: monoidal_cat
conservative_moncat V
≃ conservative (covyoneda V I_{ V})

  
V: monoidal_cat
conservative_moncat V
→ conservative (covyoneda V I_{ V})
V: monoidal_cat
conservative (covyoneda V I_{ V})
→ conservative_moncat V
V: monoidal_cat
isaprop (conservative_moncat V)
V: monoidal_cat
isaprop (conservative (covyoneda V I_{ V}))

  
V: monoidal_cat
conservative_moncat V
→ conservative (covyoneda V I_{ V})
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: conservative_moncat V
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism (# (covyoneda V I_{ V}) f)
is_z_isomorphism f

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: conservative_moncat V
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism (# (covyoneda V I_{ V}) f)
isweq (λ a : V ⟦ I_{ V}, x ⟧, a · f)

    exact (hset_z_iso_is_equiv _ _ (_ ,, Hf)).
  
V: monoidal_cat
conservative (covyoneda V I_{ V})
→ conservative_moncat V
 
V: monoidal_cat
HV: conservative (covyoneda V I_{ V})
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: isweq (λ a : V ⟦ I_{ V}, x ⟧, a · f)
is_z_isomorphism f

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: conservative (covyoneda V I_{ V})
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: isweq (λ a : V ⟦ I_{ V}, x ⟧, a · f)
is_z_isomorphism (# (covyoneda V I_{ V}) f)

    
V: monoidal_cat
HV: conservative (covyoneda V I_{ V})
x, y: V
f: V ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: isweq (λ a : V ⟦ I_{ V}, x ⟧, a · f)
(λ f : pr1 (covyoneda V I_{ V} x)
       → pr1 (covyoneda V I_{ V} y), isweq f)
  (pr2 (covyoneda V I_{ V}) x y f)

    exact Hf.
  
V: monoidal_cat
isaprop (conservative_moncat V)
 apply isaprop_conservative_moncat.
  
V: monoidal_cat
isaprop (conservative (covyoneda V I_{ V}))
 apply isaprop_conservative.
Qed.

(**
 4. Composition operations
 *)
Definition precomp_arr
           {C : category}
           {V : monoidal_cat}
           (E : enrichment C V)
           {x y : C}
           (z : C)
           (f : x --> y)
  : E ⦃ y , z ⦄ --> E ⦃ x , z ⦄
  := mon_rinvunitor _
     · (identity _ #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)
     · enriched_comp E x y z.


C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
precomp_arr E y (identity x) = identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)


C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
precomp_arr E y (identity x) = identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
  #⊗ enriched_from_arr E (identity x)
· enriched_comp E x x y = identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E x
· enriched_comp E x x y = identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E x
   · enriched_comp E x x y) = identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E x
   · enriched_comp E x x y) = ?b
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
?b = identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E x
   · enriched_comp E x x y) = ?b

    
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E x
· enriched_comp E x x y = ?t2

    
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
?t2 =
identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_id E x
· enriched_comp E x x y

    apply enrichment_id_right.
  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) · mon_runitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

  apply mon_rinvunitor_runitor.
Qed.


C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
precomp_arr E z (f · g) =
precomp_arr E z g · precomp_arr E z f


C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
precomp_arr E z (f · g) =
precomp_arr E z g · precomp_arr E z f

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E (f · g)
· enriched_comp E w y z =
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g
· enriched_comp E x y z
· (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
   · identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
   · enriched_comp E w x z)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
· (identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E (f · g)
   · enriched_comp E w y z) =
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
· (identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g
   · (enriched_comp E x y z
      · (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
         · (identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
            #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
            · enriched_comp E w x z))))

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E (f · g)
· enriched_comp E w y z =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g
· (enriched_comp E x y z
   · (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
      · (identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
         #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
         · enriched_comp E w x z)))

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E (f · g)
· enriched_comp E w y z =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g
· enriched_comp E x y z · mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· enriched_comp E w x z

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
    · enriched_comp E w x y) · enriched_comp E w y z =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g
· enriched_comp E x y z · mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· enriched_comp E w x z

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
    · enriched_comp E w x y) · enriched_comp E w y z =
?b
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g
· enriched_comp E x y z · mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· enriched_comp E w x z

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
    · enriched_comp E w x y) · enriched_comp E w y z =
?b

    
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
    · enriched_comp E w x y) = ?y'

    apply tensor_comp_id_l.
  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
· enriched_comp E w y z =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g
· enriched_comp E x y z · mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· enriched_comp E w x z

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)
· (identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
   · enriched_comp E w y z) =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g
· (enriched_comp E x y z
   · (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
      · (identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
         #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
         · enriched_comp E w x z)))

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)
· (identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
   · enriched_comp E w y z) = ?b
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g
· (enriched_comp E x y z
   · (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
      · (identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
         #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
         · enriched_comp E w x z)))

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)
· (identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
   · enriched_comp E w y z) = ?b

    
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
· enriched_comp E w y z = ?t2

    apply enrichment_assoc'.
  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)
· (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
     (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E w x z) =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g
· (enriched_comp E x y z
   · (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
      · (identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
         #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
         · enriched_comp E w x z)))

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E w x z =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g
· enriched_comp E x y z · mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· enriched_comp E w x z

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g
· enriched_comp E x y z · mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) = 
?b
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g
· enriched_comp E x y z · mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) = 
?b

    
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
    · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f) =
?y'

    apply tensor_comp_id_l.
  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g
· enriched_comp E x y z · mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· (identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
   #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)
   · (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
        (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))) =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g
· (enriched_comp E x y z
   · (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
      · identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f))

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· (identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
   #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)
   · (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
        (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))) =
?b
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E g
· (enriched_comp E x y z
   · (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
      · identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f))

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· (identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
   #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)
   · (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
        (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))) =
?b

    
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
#⊗ (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)
· (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
     (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)) =
?t2

    
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
#⊗ (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) = 
?t2

g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

   · (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)

identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ mon_rinvunitor I_{ V}
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) I_{ V} I_{ V} =
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}

  apply mon_lassociator_rassociator.
Qed.

· (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
   · identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
   · enriched_comp E x y z) =
enriched_from_arr E (f · g)

· enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f

E: enrichment C V

enriched_comp E x y z · precomp_arr E z f =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ precomp_arr E y f
· enriched_comp E w y z

enriched_comp E x y z · precomp_arr E z f =

· enriched_comp E w y z

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧

· (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
   · identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
   · enriched_comp E w x z) =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    · identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
    · enriched_comp E w x y) · enriched_comp E w y z

· enriched_comp E w x z =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    · identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f

V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ y, z ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
· enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· enriched_comp E w x z =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    · identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f

C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ y, z ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
· (enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity I_{ V}
   · (identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
      · enriched_comp E w x z)) =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    · (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
       · enriched_comp E w x y))
· enriched_comp E w y z

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ y, z ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
· (enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity I_{ V}
   · (identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
      · enriched_comp E w x z)) = ?b
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
?b =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    · (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
       · enriched_comp E w x y))
· enriched_comp E w y z

mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ y, z ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
· (enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity I_{ V}
   · (identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
      · enriched_comp E w x z)) = ?b

#⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E w x z = ?t2

· enriched_comp E w x z = ?t2

    apply enrichment_assoc.
  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ y, z ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
· (identity ((E ⦃ y, z ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
   · (mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
        (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
      · identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
      · enriched_comp E w y z)) =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    · (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
       · enriched_comp E w x y))
· enriched_comp E w y z

· identity ((E ⦃ y, z ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
  #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
· enriched_comp E w y z =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    · identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
    · enriched_comp E w x y) · enriched_comp E w y z

· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y =

    · enriched_comp E w x y)

   #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
