      exact (!(tensor_id_id _ _)).
    
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
(identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
#⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) = ?t2

    apply tensor_lassociator.
  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ y, z ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
· (mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) I_{ V}
   · identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
     #⊗ (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
         #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)) =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    · identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)

· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) I_{ V}
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f) =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    · identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)

· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f) =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  #⊗ (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ y, z ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) I_{ V} =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

E: enrichment C V

f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ y, z ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) I_{ V} =
?b
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
?b =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ y, z ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) I_{ V} =
?b

    
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ y, z ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)) = ?y'

    
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
?y' = mon_rinvunitor ((E ⦃ y, z ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))

    apply mon_rinvunitor_triangle.
  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) I_{ V}
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) I_{ V} =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) I_{ V}
   · mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) I_{ V}) =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) I_{ V}
   · mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) I_{ V}) =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity ((E ⦃ y, z ⦄) ⊗ ((E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ I_{ V}))

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) I_{ V}
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) I_{ V} =
identity ((E ⦃ y, z ⦄) ⊗ ((E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ I_{ V}))

  apply mon_rassociator_lassociator.
Qed.

Definition postcomp_arr
           {C : category}
           {V : monoidal_cat}
           (E : enrichment C V)
           {y z : C}
           (x : C)
           (f : y --> z)
  : E ⦃ x , y ⦄ --> E ⦃ x , z ⦄
  := mon_linvunitor _
     · (enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity _)
     · enriched_comp E x y z.


C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
postcomp_arr E x (identity y) = identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)


C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
postcomp_arr E x (identity y) = identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E (identity y)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) · enriched_comp E x y y =
identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_id E y #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x y y = identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (enriched_id E y #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x y y) = identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (enriched_id E y #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x y y) = ?b
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
?b = identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (enriched_id E y #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x y y) = ?b

    
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
enriched_id E y #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x y y = ?t2

    
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
?t2 =
enriched_id E y #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x y y

    apply enrichment_id_left.
  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y: C
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) · mon_lunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

  apply mon_linvunitor_lunitor.
Qed.


C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
postcomp_arr E w (f · g) =
postcomp_arr E w f · postcomp_arr E w g


C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
postcomp_arr E w (f · g) =
postcomp_arr E w f · postcomp_arr E w g

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E (f · g) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E w x z =
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E w x y
· (mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
   · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E w y z)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· (enriched_from_arr E (f · g)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) · enriched_comp E w x z) =
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· (enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
   · (enriched_comp E w x y
      · (mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
         · (enriched_from_arr E g
            #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
            · enriched_comp E w y z))))

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E (f · g) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E w x z =
enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· (enriched_comp E w x y
   · (mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
      · (enriched_from_arr E g
         #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
         · enriched_comp E w y z)))

· enriched_comp E w x z =
enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E w x y · mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E w y z

g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
(identity I_{ V} · enriched_from_arr E g)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
    · enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y =
enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· (enriched_comp E w x y
   · (mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
      · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)))

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
(identity I_{ V} · enriched_from_arr E g
 · identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄))
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
    · enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
    · enriched_comp E w x y) =
enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· (enriched_comp E w x y
   · (mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
      · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)))

    · enriched_comp E w x y) =

V: monoidal_cat

· identity I_{ V}
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)) =

C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_rinvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) =
identity I_{ V} #⊗ mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C

g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) =
mon_rinvunitor I_{ V} #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} I_{ V} (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)

  apply mon_inv_triangle.
Qed.

E: enrichment C V

f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

identity I_{ V}

  apply mon_linvunitor_lunitor.
Qed.


C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E f · postcomp_arr E x g =
enriched_from_arr E (f · g)


C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E f · postcomp_arr E x g =
enriched_from_arr E (f · g)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E f
· (mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x y z) =
enriched_from_arr E (f · g)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E f
· (mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x y z) =
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· enriched_comp E x y z

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E f · mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x y z =
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· enriched_comp E x y z

E: enrichment C V

enriched_from_arr E f · mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f =
enriched_from_arr E f · mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f = 
?b
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y, z: C

?b =

C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f = ?t2

    apply tensor_split.
  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
   · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)) =
enriched_from_arr E f · mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
enriched_from_arr E f · mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f =
enriched_from_arr E f · mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E f · mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) =
mon_linvunitor I_{ V}
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f

  apply tensor_linvunitor.
Qed.


C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_comp E w x y · postcomp_arr E w f =
postcomp_arr E x f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E w x z


C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_comp E w x y · postcomp_arr E w f =
postcomp_arr E x f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E w x z

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_comp E w x y
· (mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
   · enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E w y z) =
(mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
 · enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
 · enriched_comp E x y z) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E w x z

V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V

· (enriched_from_arr E f
   #⊗ identity ((E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))
   · (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)

    · enriched_comp E x y z)) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)

f: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor ((E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))
· mon_rassociator I_{ V} (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· (enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) =
(mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
 · enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
#⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor ((E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))
· mon_rassociator I_{ V} (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· (enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) =
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· (enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor ((E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))
· mon_rassociator I_{ V} (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) =
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)

V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V

· mon_rassociator I_{ V} (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) =
?b
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b =
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)

· mon_rassociator I_{ V} (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) =

C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor ((E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)) = ?y'

    
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
?y' = mon_linvunitor ((E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))

    apply mon_linvunitor_triangle.
  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· mon_rassociator I_{ V} (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) =
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
   · mon_rassociator I_{ V} (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)) =
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
   · mon_rassociator I_{ V} (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)) =
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity (I_{ V} ⊗ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_lassociator I_{ V} (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· mon_rassociator I_{ V} (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) =
identity (I_{ V} ⊗ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))

  apply mon_lassociator_rassociator.
Qed.


C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
precomp_arr E z f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E w x z =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ postcomp_arr E w f
· enriched_comp E w y z


C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
precomp_arr E z f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E w x z =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ postcomp_arr E w f
· enriched_comp E w y z

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
(mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
 · identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
 · enriched_comp E x y z) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E w x z =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ postcomp_arr E w f
· enriched_comp E w y z

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· (identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E w x z =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ postcomp_arr E w f
· enriched_comp E w y z

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· ((identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
   · (enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E w x z)) =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ postcomp_arr E w f
· enriched_comp E w y z

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· ((identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
   · (mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
        (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
      · identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
      · enriched_comp E w y z)) =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ postcomp_arr E w f
· enriched_comp E w y z

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· (identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
· enriched_comp E w y z =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ postcomp_arr E w f
· enriched_comp E w y z

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· (identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ postcomp_arr E w f

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· (identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
#⊗ (mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
    · enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
    · enriched_comp E w x y)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· (identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y

V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· (identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· ((identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
   · mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
       (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)) =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· (mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) I_{ V} (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
   · identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
     #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E f
         #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))) =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) I_{ V} (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)) =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
  #⊗ (enriched_from_arr E f #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) I_{ V} (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) I_{ V} (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) =
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· mon_lassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) I_{ V} (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
precomp_arr E y f · postcomp_arr E w g =
postcomp_arr E x g · precomp_arr E z f


C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
precomp_arr E y f · postcomp_arr E w g =
postcomp_arr E x g · precomp_arr E z f

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· enriched_comp E w x y
· (mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
   · enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E w y z) =
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x y z
· (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
   · identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
   · enriched_comp E w x z)

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
   · (enriched_comp E w x y
      · (mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
         · (enriched_from_arr E g
            #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
            · enriched_comp E w y z)))) =
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (enriched_comp E x y z
      · (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
         · (identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
            #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
            · enriched_comp E w x z))))

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
   · (enriched_comp E w x y
      · (mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
         · (enriched_from_arr E g
            #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
            · enriched_comp E w y z)))) = ?b
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b =
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (enriched_comp E x y z
      · (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
         · (identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
            #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
            · enriched_comp E w x z))))

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
   · (enriched_comp E w x y
      · (mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
         · (enriched_from_arr E g
            #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
            · enriched_comp E w y z)))) = ?b

    
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_comp E w x y
· (mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
   · (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E w y z)) = ?t2

    
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_comp E w x y · mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E w y z = ?t2

    
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_comp E w x y · mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E w y z = ?b
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b = ?t2

    
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_comp E w x y · mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E w y z = ?b

      
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_comp E w x y · mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ w, y ⦄) =
?y'

      apply tensor_linvunitor.
    
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor ((E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))
· identity I_{ V} #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
· enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E w y z = ?t2

    
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor ((E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))
· (identity I_{ V} #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
   · (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E w y z)) = ?t2

    
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
· (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E w y z) = ?t2

    
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
identity I_{ V} #⊗ enriched_comp E w x y
· enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E w y z = ?t2

C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
   · (mon_linvunitor ((E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))
      · (enriched_from_arr E g
         #⊗ identity ((E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))
         · (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
              (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
            · enriched_comp E x y z
              #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
            · enriched_comp E w x z)))) =
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (enriched_comp E x y z
      · (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
         · (identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
            #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
            · enriched_comp E w x z))))

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· mon_linvunitor ((E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))
· enriched_from_arr E g
  #⊗ identity ((E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E w x z =
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x y z · mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· enriched_comp E w x z

V: monoidal_cat

g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· mon_linvunitor ((E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))
· enriched_from_arr E g
  #⊗ identity ((E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))
· mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
    (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) =
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x y z · mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f

V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C

· (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
   · (mon_linvunitor ((E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))
      · (enriched_from_arr E g
         #⊗ identity ((E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))
         · (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
              (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
            · enriched_comp E x y z
              #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))))) =
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (enriched_comp E x y z
      · (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
         · identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
           #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)))

V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C

g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧

· (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
   · (mon_linvunitor ((E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))
      · (enriched_from_arr E g
         #⊗ identity ((E ⦃ x, y ⦄) ⊗ (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))
         · (mon_rassociator (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
              (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)

              #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))))) = ?b

· (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (enriched_comp E x y z
      · (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
         · identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
           #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)))

C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
   · (mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
      · (enriched_from_arr E g
         #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
        #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))) =
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (enriched_comp E x y z
      · (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
         · identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
           #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)))

g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧

· (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
   · (mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
      · (enriched_from_arr E g
         #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
        #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))) =
?b
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b =
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (enriched_comp E x y z
      · (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
         · identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
           #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)))

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
   · (mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
      · (enriched_from_arr E g
         #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
        #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
      · enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄))) =
?b

    
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· (mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
   · (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
     #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)) =
?t2

· mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) = 
?t2

  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) =

  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)

      apply tensor_split'.
    
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· identity (I_{ V} ⊗ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
  #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f
· (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
  #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) =

      #⊗ identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)

  #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f

C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
   · ((enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
      #⊗ identity I_{ V}
      · (enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity I_{ V}
         · identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
           #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f))) =
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (enriched_comp E x y z
      · (mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
         · identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
           #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f)))

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
  #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f =
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x y z · mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
· identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄) #⊗ enriched_from_arr E f

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
  #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity I_{ V} =
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x y z · mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)

E: enrichment C V

g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
  #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity I_{ V} = ?b

?b =

· enriched_comp E x y z · mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)

· mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄) #⊗ identity I_{ V}

    apply tensor_rinvunitor.
  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· mon_rinvunitor (I_{ V} ⊗ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
· (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
  #⊗ identity I_{ V}
· enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity I_{ V} =
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x y z · mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)

E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (mon_rinvunitor (I_{ V} ⊗ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
   · ((enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
      #⊗ identity I_{ V}
      · enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity I_{ V})) =
mon_linvunitor (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · (enriched_comp E x y z
      · mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)))

V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V

· ((enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
   #⊗ identity I_{ V}
   · enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity I_{ V}) =
enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (enriched_comp E x y z · mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄))

   #⊗ identity I_{ V}

?b =

· (enriched_comp E x y z · mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄))

(enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
#⊗ identity I_{ V}
· enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity I_{ V} = ?t2

    
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
?t2 =
(enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
#⊗ identity I_{ V}
· enriched_comp E x y z #⊗ identity I_{ V}

    apply tensor_comp_id_r.
  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (I_{ V} ⊗ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
· (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x y z) #⊗ identity I_{ V} =
enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (enriched_comp E x y z · mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄))

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (I_{ V} ⊗ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
· (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x y z) #⊗ identity I_{ V} = ?b
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b =
enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (enriched_comp E x y z · mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄))

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
mon_rinvunitor (I_{ V} ⊗ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
· (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x y z) #⊗ identity I_{ V} = ?b

    
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b =
mon_rinvunitor (I_{ V} ⊗ (E ⦃ x, y ⦄))
· (enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
   · enriched_comp E x y z) #⊗ identity I_{ V}

    apply tensor_rinvunitor.
  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· enriched_comp E x y z · mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄) =
enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (enriched_comp E x y z · mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄))

  
C: category
V: monoidal_cat
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (enriched_comp E x y z · mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)) =
enriched_from_arr E g #⊗ identity (E ⦃ x, y ⦄)
· (enriched_comp E x y z · mon_rinvunitor (E ⦃ x, z ⦄))

  apply idpath.
Qed.


V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
is_z_isomorphism (postcomp_arr E w f)


V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
is_z_isomorphism (postcomp_arr E w f)

  
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
f_iso:= make_z_iso f (is_z_isomorphism_mor Hf) Hf: z_iso x y
is_z_isomorphism (postcomp_arr E w f)

  
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
f_iso:= make_z_iso f (is_z_isomorphism_mor Hf) Hf: z_iso x y
V ⟦ E ⦃ w, y ⦄, E ⦃ w, x ⦄ ⟧
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
f_iso:= make_z_iso f (is_z_isomorphism_mor Hf) Hf: z_iso x y
is_inverse_in_precat (postcomp_arr E w f) ?g

  
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
f_iso:= make_z_iso f (is_z_isomorphism_mor Hf) Hf: z_iso x y
V ⟦ E ⦃ w, y ⦄, E ⦃ w, x ⦄ ⟧
 exact (postcomp_arr E w (inv_from_z_iso f_iso)).
  
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
f_iso:= make_z_iso f (is_z_isomorphism_mor Hf) Hf: z_iso x y
is_inverse_in_precat (postcomp_arr E w f)
  (postcomp_arr E w (inv_from_z_iso f_iso))
 
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
f_iso:= make_z_iso f (is_z_isomorphism_mor Hf) Hf: z_iso x y
postcomp_arr E w f
· postcomp_arr E w (inv_from_z_iso f_iso) =
identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
f_iso:= make_z_iso f (is_z_isomorphism_mor Hf) Hf: z_iso x y
postcomp_arr E w (inv_from_z_iso f_iso)
· postcomp_arr E w f = identity (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)

    
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
f_iso:= make_z_iso f (is_z_isomorphism_mor Hf) Hf: z_iso x y
postcomp_arr E w f
· postcomp_arr E w (inv_from_z_iso f_iso) =
identity (E ⦃ w, x ⦄)
 abstract
        (rewrite <- postcomp_arr_comp ;
         rewrite <- postcomp_arr_id ;
         apply maponpaths ;
         apply (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso f_iso)).
    
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
f_iso:= make_z_iso f (is_z_isomorphism_mor Hf) Hf: z_iso x y
postcomp_arr E w (inv_from_z_iso f_iso)
· postcomp_arr E w f = identity (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)
 abstract
        (rewrite <- postcomp_arr_comp ;
         rewrite <- postcomp_arr_id ;
         apply maponpaths ;
         apply (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv f_iso)).
Defined.


V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
z_iso (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)


V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
z_iso (E ⦃ w, x ⦄) (E ⦃ w, y ⦄)

  
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
is_z_isomorphism (postcomp_arr E w f)

  
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
w, x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
is_z_isomorphism f

  exact (pr2 f).
Defined.


V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
z, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
is_z_isomorphism (precomp_arr E z f)


V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
z, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
is_z_isomorphism (precomp_arr E z f)

  
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
z, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
f_iso:= make_z_iso f (is_z_isomorphism_mor Hf) Hf: z_iso x y
is_z_isomorphism (precomp_arr E z f)

  
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
z, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
f_iso:= make_z_iso f (is_z_isomorphism_mor Hf) Hf: z_iso x y
V ⟦ E ⦃ x, z ⦄, E ⦃ y, z ⦄ ⟧
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
z, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
f_iso:= make_z_iso f (is_z_isomorphism_mor Hf) Hf: z_iso x y
is_inverse_in_precat (precomp_arr E z f) ?g

  
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
z, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
f_iso:= make_z_iso f (is_z_isomorphism_mor Hf) Hf: z_iso x y
V ⟦ E ⦃ x, z ⦄, E ⦃ y, z ⦄ ⟧
 exact (precomp_arr E z (inv_from_z_iso f_iso)).
  
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
z, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
f_iso:= make_z_iso f (is_z_isomorphism_mor Hf) Hf: z_iso x y
is_inverse_in_precat (precomp_arr E z f)
  (precomp_arr E z (inv_from_z_iso f_iso))
 
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
z, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
f_iso:= make_z_iso f (is_z_isomorphism_mor Hf) Hf: z_iso x y
precomp_arr E z f
· precomp_arr E z (inv_from_z_iso f_iso) =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
z, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
f_iso:= make_z_iso f (is_z_isomorphism_mor Hf) Hf: z_iso x y
precomp_arr E z (inv_from_z_iso f_iso)
· precomp_arr E z f = identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)

    
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
z, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
f_iso:= make_z_iso f (is_z_isomorphism_mor Hf) Hf: z_iso x y
precomp_arr E z f
· precomp_arr E z (inv_from_z_iso f_iso) =
identity (E ⦃ y, z ⦄)
 abstract
        (rewrite <- precomp_arr_comp ;
         rewrite <- precomp_arr_id ;
         apply maponpaths ;
         apply (z_iso_after_z_iso_inv f_iso)).
    
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
z, x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: is_z_isomorphism f
f_iso:= make_z_iso f (is_z_isomorphism_mor Hf) Hf: z_iso x y
precomp_arr E z (inv_from_z_iso f_iso)
· precomp_arr E z f = identity (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)
 abstract
        (rewrite <- precomp_arr_comp ;
         rewrite <- precomp_arr_id ;
         apply maponpaths ;
         apply (z_iso_inv_after_z_iso f_iso)).
Defined.


V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
z, x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
z_iso (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)


V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
z, x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
z_iso (E ⦃ y, z ⦄) (E ⦃ x, z ⦄)

  
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
z, x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
is_z_isomorphism (precomp_arr E z f)

  
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
z, x, y: C
f: z_iso x y
is_z_isomorphism f

  exact (pr2 f).
Defined.

(**
 5. Transport lemmas
 *)

V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
x₁, x₂: C
p: x₁ = x₂
y: C
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
transportf (λ x : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧) p f =
enriched_from_arr E
  (idtoiso (! p) · enriched_to_arr E f)


V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
x₁, x₂: C
p: x₁ = x₂
y: C
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
transportf (λ x : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧) p f =
enriched_from_arr E
  (idtoiso (! p) · enriched_to_arr E f)

  
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
x₁, y: C
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
f =
enriched_from_arr E
  (identity x₁ · enriched_to_arr E f)

  
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
x₁, y: C
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
f = enriched_from_arr E (enriched_to_arr E f)

  
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
x₁, y: C
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
f = f

  apply idpath.
Qed.


V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
x, y₁, y₂: C
p: y₁ = y₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, E ⦃ x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
transportf (λ y : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧) p f =
enriched_from_arr E (enriched_to_arr E f · idtoiso p)


V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
x, y₁, y₂: C
p: y₁ = y₂
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, E ⦃ x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
transportf (λ y : C, V ⟦ I_{ V}, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧) p f =
enriched_from_arr E (enriched_to_arr E f · idtoiso p)

  
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
x, y₁: C
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, E ⦃ x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
f =
enriched_from_arr E
  (enriched_to_arr E f · identity y₁)

  
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
x, y₁: C
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, E ⦃ x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
f = enriched_from_arr E (enriched_to_arr E f)

  
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
x, y₁: C
f: V ⟦ I_{ V}, E ⦃ x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
f = f

  apply idpath.
Qed.


V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
x₁, x₂: C
p: x₁ = x₂
y: C
v: V
f: V ⟦ v, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
transportf (λ x : C, V ⟦ v, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧) p f =
f · precomp_arr E y (idtoiso (! p))


V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
x₁, x₂: C
p: x₁ = x₂
y: C
v: V
f: V ⟦ v, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
transportf (λ x : C, V ⟦ v, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧) p f =
f · precomp_arr E y (idtoiso (! p))

  
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
x₁, y: C
v: V
f: V ⟦ v, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
f = f · precomp_arr E y (identity x₁)

  
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
x₁, y: C
v: V
f: V ⟦ v, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
f = f · identity (E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄)

  
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
x₁, y: C
v: V
f: V ⟦ v, E ⦃ x₁, y ⦄ ⟧
f = f

  apply idpath.
Qed.


V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
x, y₁, y₂: C
p: y₁ = y₂
v: V
f: V ⟦ v, E ⦃ x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
transportf (λ y : C, V ⟦ v, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧) p f =
f · postcomp_arr E x (idtoiso p)


V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
x, y₁, y₂: C
p: y₁ = y₂
v: V
f: V ⟦ v, E ⦃ x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
transportf (λ y : C, V ⟦ v, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧) p f =
f · postcomp_arr E x (idtoiso p)



V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
x, y₁, y₂: C
p: y₁ = y₂
v: V
f: V ⟦ v, E ⦃ x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
transportf (λ y : C, V ⟦ v, E ⦃ x, y ⦄ ⟧) p f =
f · postcomp_arr E x (idtoiso p)

  
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
x, y₁: C
v: V
f: V ⟦ v, E ⦃ x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
f = f · postcomp_arr E x (identity y₁)

  
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
x, y₁: C
v: V
f: V ⟦ v, E ⦃ x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
f = f · identity (E ⦃ x, y₁ ⦄)

  
V: monoidal_cat
C: category
E: enrichment C V
x, y₁: C
v: V
f: V ⟦ v, E ⦃ x, y₁ ⦄ ⟧
f = f

  apply idpath.
Qed.
